title: SPRD-727 Beautiful aunt Ayako Kirishima
overview: Kenichi, a young man who returned to his parents' house for the first time in a long time during the spring holidays, was frustrated by the tired words of his brother, and visited the house of Ayako, who lives in the neighboring village. Aunt Ayako, a relative who reunited for the first time in ten years, became an adult woman with a sweet smell that was even more beautiful and ripe from her childhood memories.
